把学到的知识整理成文章，加深理解</li>\n<li><strong>分享经验</strong> - 帮助他人解决遇到的问题</li>\n<li><strong>持续成长</strong> - 通过输出倒逼输入，保持学习的动力</li>\n</ol>\n<h2>接下来要写什么</h2>\n<p>我会分享关于 Java、Go、Python 和后端开发的学习笔记，还有前端技术的探索。</p>\n<p>敬请期待！</p>\n"}}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"mt-16 pt-8 border-t border-gray-100","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap gap-2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-gray-500 mr-2","children":"标签:"}],[["$","$L11","随笔",{"href":"/blog?tag=%E9%9A%8F%E7%AC%94","className":"text-sm px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 hover:bg-orange-100 hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"随笔"}],["$","$L11","开始",{"href":"/blog?tag=%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B","className":"text-sm px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 hover:bg-orange-100 hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"开始"}]]]}]}]]}]}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"py-8 px-4 border-t border-gray-100","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"max-w-5xl mx-auto text-center","children":["$","p",null,{"className":"text-gray-500 text-sm","children":["© ",2026," Kairos Blog"]}]}]}]]
